task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main interface is visible, showing channels or the workspace, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Administration Settings page for Accounts/User profiles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration panel is open, specifically showing the Settings section related to Accounts or User profile editing.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Allow Real Name Change' is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch or checkbox for 'Allow Real Name Change' is in the off/disabled position.
The toggle switch or checkbox for 'Allow Username Change' is in the off/disabled position.
The toggle switch or checkbox for 'Allow Email Change' is in the off/disabled position.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Allow User Avatar Change' is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch or checkbox for 'Allow User Avatar Change' is in the off/disabled position.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Allow Delete Own Account' is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch or checkbox for 'Allow Delete Own Account' is in the off/disabled position.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rocket.Chat web UI, not terminal commands, scripts, or API tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the genuine Rocket.Chat application, not a text editor or a local HTML mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the settings changes were genuinely applied in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The toggles are clearly switched off in the live UI, and any 'Save changes' button (if present) has been clicked or the settings show as updated.
